ns0:entry.ns0:title: HigherOrderCO/Bend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HigherOrderCO/Bend
Language: rust
A massively parallel, high-level programming language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/OpenShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/OpenShell
Language: rust
OpenShell is the safe, private runtime for autonomous AI agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
Language: rust
Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
Language: rust
Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaif-goose/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose
Language: rust
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: emilk/egui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/emilk/egui
Language: rust
egui: an easy-to-use immediate mode GUI in Rust that runs on both web and native

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eythaann/Seelen-UI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eythaann/Seelen-UI
Language: rust
The Fully Customizable Desktop Environment for Windows 10/11.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jdx/mise
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jdx/mise
Language: rust
dev tools, env vars, task runner

ns0:entry.ns0:title: junhoyeo/tokscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/junhoyeo/tokscale
Language: rust
🛰️ A CLI tool for tracking token usage from OpenCode, Claude Code, 🦞OpenClaw, Pi, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, AmpCode, Factory Droid, Kimi, and more! • 🏅Global Leaderboard + 2D/3D Contributions Graph

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meilisearch/meilisearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meilisearch/meilisearch
Language: rust
A lightning-fast search engine API bringing AI-powered hybrid search to your sites and applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ogulcancelik/herdr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr
Language: rust
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oven-sh/bun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oven-sh/bun
Language: rust
Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raine/workmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raine/workmux
Language: rust
git worktrees + tmux windows for zero-friction parallel dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rerun-io/rerun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rerun-io/rerun
Language: rust
Visualize, query, and stream to train on multimodal robotics data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustdesk/rustdesk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk
Language: rust
An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuVector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector
Language: rust
RuVector is a High Performance, Real-Time, Self-Learning Ai, Vector GNN, Memory DB built in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tinyhumansai/openhuman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman
Language: rust
Your Personal AI super intelligence. A brain that builds a local-first memory of your life, a fantastic orchestrator of agent fleets and workflows, and a deep researcher.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonhowtf/omniget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonhowtf/omniget
Language: rust
Open-source desktop app for downloading, organizing and studying media. Native cross-platform (Tauri + Rust + Svelte). PDF/EPUB reader with focus mode, timestamped notes and spaced repetition. Media downloads via yt-dlp (1.800+ sites). Extensible plugin system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zellij-org/zellij
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zellij-org/zellij
Language: rust
A terminal workspace with batteries included
